name: Waiola Shave Ice
tagline: Honolulu institution since 1979 — cloud-soft ice that soaks up syrup better than anywhere.
mustOrder: any flavor — the ice texture is the star here
parking: Street parking on Waiola St or in the small lot behind the shop
talkStory: Operating in Mo'ili'ili since 1979, Waiola is the shave ice spot that UH Manoa students, professors, and neighborhood families have relied on for over four decades. The ice texture here is legendary -- shaved so fine it's almost powdery, meaning the syrup absorbs completely instead of pooling at the bottom. Won Honolulu Magazine's Best Shave Ice multiple years. The residential neighborhood location means no tourist crowds, just regulars who consider any other shave ice inferior.
